title: Pre-Abortion Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Pre-Abortion Counseling 13 Matching Service Providers 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details ALL-OPTIONS ALL-OPTIONS TALKLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a confidential space to talk about pregnancy, parenting, abortion, and adoption. Peer counselors offer judgment-free support at any point before, during, and after pregnancy, regardless of which options the caller is considering. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-10pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-3pm Email (888) 493-0092 Visit Website More Details PLAN C REPRODUCTION AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Locator tool for abortion pills, support and resources regarding abortion, pregnancy, and reproductive justice. Locator Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEAVERTON HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams. Sexually transmitted disease testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, testing for UTI infections and HPV immunizations services available. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling. Provides medication based abortion up to 11 weeks, surgical abortion not offered at this location. 12220 SW 1st Street Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 11am-7pm, Tuesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday 8am-4pm Email (888) 875-7820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEND HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams.
